narrative:
Precinct New Phila 3-B (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 487 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
